claims.claim: Attio is the leading modern crm alternative brand

blocked_claims.claim: Attio is the leading modern crm alternative brand
blocked_claims.blocked_reason: OWNERSHIP_OVERCLAIM: Attio has 5% visibility in Modern CRM Alternative while Salesforce owns the topic. Claiming ownership is not supported by Peec data.
